noticia.titulo: The Extreme, R-Rated Slasher That Messed Up By Trying To Be A Kid's Movie
noticia.texto_resumido: Early 90s slashers are so unhinged that I can’t help but love them. My personal favorite is 1992’s Dr. Giggles … Continue reading "The Extreme, R-Rated Slasher That Messed Up By Trying To Be A Kid’s Movie"
